headline: Michael Carrick confirms 'fantastic' Man Utd star is back from injury
snippet: Carrick will have one more option available (Picture: Getty Images) Mason Mount is in contention to return to the Manchester United squad this weekend against Aston Villa. Since joining Chelsea in the
full_text: Carrick will have one more option available (Picture: Getty Images) Mason Mount is in contention to return to the Manchester United squad this weekend against Aston Villa. Since joining Chelsea in the summer of 2023, Mount’s time in Manchester has been largely beset by injuries, starting just 29 matches with a return of seven goals. The midfielder did enjoy a relatively injury-free first-half of the season under Ruben Amorim but picked up another knock shortly after Michael Carrick’s appointment in January. Mount has managed just one minute of first-team football under the interim United boss, ruled out of the last six games, He has now returned to training and is contention to make the squad on Sunday for the visit of Unai Emery’s side. ‘Mason’s back with the group, which is fantastic,’ Carrick said. ‘He’s an important player for us, Mason, and to have him back and involved is a good step for us, definitely. Your football fix Metro's Head of Sport James Goldman delivers punchy analysi...
